scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,doc,srv -c cyan,yellow,green "vite --host 0.0.0.0" "pnpm docs:dev" "go tool wgo run ./cmd/aviary serve"
scripts.build: pnpm run build:web && pnpm run build:go
scripts.build:web: vue-tsc --noEmit && vite build && pnpm run build:copy
scripts.lint:fix: concurrently -n biome,go "biome check --write ." "gofmt -w . && go tool golangci-lint run --fix ./..."
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm exec playwright install && playwright test
scripts.package: pnpm exec vpr run -f pnpm package:stage
scripts.release: pnpm exec vpr run -c pnpm release:stage && git pull
scripts.release:major: cross-env VERSION=major pnpm release:prepare && pnpm release
scripts.release:minor: cross-env VERSION=minor pnpm release:prepare && pnpm release
scripts.release:patch: cross-env VERSION=patch pnpm release:prepare && pnpm release
